name: Baked Scalloped Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large casserole dish, place one can of regular corn.
2. Sprinkle a layer of crushed crackers over the corn.
3. Add one can of creamed corn on top.
4. Sprinkle another layer of crushed crackers over the creamed corn.
5. Add the second can of kernel corn and the second can of creamed corn.
6. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, pepper, and onion powder until well combined.
7. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the layers of corn.
8. Use a fork to gently push some of the egg mixture through the holes in the corn, allowing it to seep into the layers below.
9. Sprinkle a large layer of crackers on top of the egg mixture.
10. Melt the butter and pour it over the top layer of crackers.
11. Bake for 1 hour at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Note: Ensure that all ingredients are measured accurately, using standard units such as cups (c), tablespoons (Tbsp), teaspoons (tsp), and ounces when necessary.
